---
title: "Worked Examples"
jupyter: diffeq_py
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
---

This page is a compendium of worked examples for MATH 341 *Differential Equations*

- [Showing a function is a solution](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/examples_01) works through the details of showing that a particular function solves a particular differential equation.
